questions.question: Which of the following fields uses machine learning?
questions.explanation: Machine learning is applied in many fields including medicine, engineering, and computer science.

questions.question: What is a type of machine learning that involves training a model on labeled data to make predictions?
questions.explanation: Supervised learning involves training a model on labeled data to make predictions.

questions.question: One of the biggest challenges of machine learning is
questions.explanation: Data quality issues are one of the biggest challenges in machine learning.

questions.question: What is the first step in the machine learning process?
questions.explanation: Data preparation is the first step in the machine learning process.

questions.question: Machine learning has many applications in
questions.explanation: Machine learning has many applications in healthcare, finance, and education.
